posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
In order to help bridge the current gap with the Make modules for monday.com, we have created a Make app that will allow you to run monday.com GraphQL queries while letting you to specify the API version you want.

The app is available for anyone to use now and going forward. For details and the install link go here: TMM monday.com Tools

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great and thank you for providing the tool to the community.
